---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea or a new scanning rule
title: "[FEATURE]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem or a specific Lighthouse metric?**
A clear description of the problem (e.g., "Lighthouse flags missing names on social icons and ScoreFix isn't detecting them yet").

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of the feature or rule you want to see.

**How would this improve your ScoreFix or Lighthouse score?**
Explain the direct benefit for the user.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any other plugins or manual methods you've tried and why they didn't work for you.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, sketches, or examples here.
